name: Brand Voice Compliance - Liquid Death
description: Check if marketing copy complies with brand voice guidelines. If non-compliant, identify the problematic phrases and suggest an on-brand replacement.
guidelines:
Brand: Liquid Death

Voice: Liquid Death is a canned water brand that markets itself like a punk rock energy drink. The voice is irreverent, self-aware, and aggressively casual. It mocks corporate marketing while being corporate marketing. Think: your funniest friend who happens to sell water and knows the whole thing is absurd. Copy should feel like it was written by someone who hates ads but is weirdly good at writing them.

Rules:
  - Use casual, conversational tone — like texting a friend who gets your humor
  - Never use corporate jargon or formal marketing speak
  - Keep sentences short and punchy — no walls of text
  - Be self-aware — we know we're selling water and that's inherently funny
  - Anti-establishment energy — we're the opposite of clean wellness brands
  - Contractions always — 'we're' not 'we are', 'don't' not 'do not'
  - Talk TO people, not AT them — second person ('you') over third person
  - Humor should be dry and deadpan, not try-hard or slapstick
  - Never beg for attention — no 'Buy now!' or 'Don't miss out!'
  - Swearing is fine in moderation but never forced or edgy for the sake of it

Banned phrases (never use these):
  - "premium quality"
  - "best-in-class"
  - "innovative solution"
  - "we're committed to"
  - "don't hesitate to"
  - "leverage"
  - "synergy"
  - "world-class"
  - "cutting-edge"
  - "hydration solution"
  - "please don't hesitate"
  - "valued customer"
  - "at your earliest convenience"
  - "industry-leading"
  - "holistic approach"
  - "empower"
  - "optimize your wellness"
  - "curated experience"
  - "seamless integration"
  - "thought leader"
  - "paradigm shift"
  - "move the needle"
  - "circle back"
  - "low-hanging fruit"
  - "revolutionary"
  - "game-changing"
  - "best practices"
  - "core competency"
  - "actionable insights"
  - "robust platform"

Preferred alternatives:
  - Instead of "purchase", say "grab"
  - Instead of "consume", say "drink"
  - Instead of "beverage", say "tallboy"
  - Instead of "customer", say "human"
  - Instead of "utilize", say "use"
  - Instead of "facilitate", say "help"
  - Instead of "implement", say "do"
  - Instead of "regarding", say "about"
  - Instead of "in order to", say "to"
  - Instead of "at this time", say "right now"
  - Instead of "going forward", say "from now on"
  - Instead of "reach out", say "hit us up"
  - Instead of "provide feedback", say "tell us what you think"
  - Instead of "experience", say "thing"
  - Instead of "solution", say "thing that works"

Tone keywords: irreverent, punk, blunt, deadpan, casual, anti-corporate, self-aware, absurdist

Max sentence length: 20 words

Passive voice allowed: No

fields.name: compliant
fields.description: 'true' if copy is on-brand, 'false' if not

fields.name: flagged_phrases
fields.description: Comma-separated list of problematic phrases, or empty string if compliant

fields.name: suggestion
fields.description: Rewritten on-brand version of the copy, or empty string if already compliant

examples.marketing_copy: Don't be the person who brings a plastic bottle to a party. Grab a tallboy. Your recycling bin will thank you.
We sell water. In a can. You're welcome.
Other water brands want you to feel zen. We want you to feel like you just crowd-surfed at a show.
Your tap water has been through some stuff. Ours comes from the Alps. Same price, way less trauma.
Yeah it's just water. But it's water that looks sick on your desk.
Hydration doesn't have to be boring. It also doesn't have to be interesting. It just has to be in a can.
We put water in a tallboy because bottles are for people who trust airport wifi.
If you're reading this, you're probably thirsty. Or bored. Either way, we can help with one of those.
Our whole thing is selling water to people who think water brands are dumb. And honestly, same.
You don't need another wellness brand telling you to hydrate. But you do need a tallboy. Trust us.
Liquid Death: for people who want to drink water but make it look like they're drinking something cooler.
We're not a lifestyle brand. We're water in a can. Stop overthinking it.
Liquid Death is committed to providing a premium quality hydration solution for today's discerning consumer.
examples.flagged_phrases: committed to providing, premium quality, hydration solution
examples.suggestion: We made water that doesn't suck. You're the type of person who gets that.

examples.marketing_copy: Our innovative solution leverages cutting-edge filtration to deliver a best-in-class beverage experience.
examples.flagged_phrases: innovative solution, leverages, cutting-edge, best-in-class, beverage experience
examples.suggestion: We filter our water really well. It tastes good. That's the whole pitch.

examples.marketing_copy: We would like to circle back on our holistic approach to sustainable hydration and move the needle on industry best practices.
examples.flagged_phrases: circle back, holistic approach, move the needle, best practices
examples.suggestion: We're trying to make water less wasteful. Cans recycle better than plastic. Done.

examples.marketing_copy: At Liquid Death, we empower our valued customers to optimize their wellness journey through our curated experience.
examples.flagged_phrases: empower, valued customers, optimize, wellness journey, curated experience
examples.suggestion: Drink water. Feel fine. That's the whole journey.

examples.marketing_copy: We invite you to explore our extensive range of premium hydration products at your earliest convenience.
examples.flagged_phrases: at your earliest convenience, premium, extensive range
examples.suggestion: We've got water. Still or sparkling. Grab one whenever.

examples.marketing_copy: Please do not hesitate to reach out to our customer support team regarding any inquiries you may have.
examples.flagged_phrases: please do not hesitate, reach out, regarding, inquiries
examples.suggestion: Got a question? Hit us up. We actually read these.

examples.marketing_copy: Liquid Death is pleased to announce the launch of our revolutionary new sparkling water product line.
examples.flagged_phrases: pleased to announce, revolutionary, product line
examples.suggestion: New sparkling water just dropped. It's bubbly and it's in a can. You know the drill.

examples.marketing_copy: Our cans are crafted with care and designed to be enjoyed by health-conscious individuals.
examples.flagged_phrases: are crafted with care, designed to be enjoyed, health-conscious individuals
examples.suggestion: We make cans of water. You drink them. Nobody needs to be 'health-conscious' about it.

examples.marketing_copy: A portion of proceeds is donated to environmental initiatives that are supported by our organization.
examples.flagged_phrases: is donated, are supported by our organization
examples.suggestion: We give some of the money to help the planet. Because, you know, we live here too.

examples.marketing_copy: Buy now and don't miss out on this incredible limited-time offer! Act fast before supplies run out!
examples.flagged_phrases: Buy now, don't miss out, incredible, limited-time offer, Act fast
examples.suggestion: We made some stuff. There's not a ton of it. If you want some, cool.

examples.marketing_copy: Subscribe today and save 20%! This game-changing deal won't last forever!
examples.flagged_phrases: Subscribe today, game-changing, won't last forever
examples.suggestion: You can subscribe and save 20%. Or don't. We're not your mom.

examples.marketing_copy: At Liquid Death, we believe that every single person on this planet deserves access to clean, refreshing, mountain-sourced water that not only quenches their thirst but also contributes to a more sustainable and environmentally responsible future for generations to come.
examples.flagged_phrases: we believe that every single person on this planet deserves access to, not only quenches their thirst but also contributes to, for generations to come
examples.suggestion: Clean water from the mountains. In a can that actually gets recycled. The end.

examples.marketing_copy: Nourish your body and nurture your soul with the pure, life-giving essence of mountain spring water.
examples.flagged_phrases: nourish your body, nurture your soul, life-giving essence
examples.suggestion: It's water from a mountain. Drink it. Your body will figure out the rest.

examples.marketing_copy: Begin your mindful hydration ritual with Liquid Death — because self-care starts from within.
examples.flagged_phrases: mindful hydration ritual, self-care starts from within
examples.suggestion: Drink some water. It's not a ritual. It's just water.

examples.marketing_copy: Consumers who choose Liquid Death are making a responsible choice for the environment and their personal health.
examples.flagged_phrases: consumers, making a responsible choice
examples.suggestion: You grabbed a can of water. Congrats, you recycled something today. Don't let it go to your head.

examples.marketing_copy: The Liquid Death brand represents a paradigm shift in how the beverage industry approaches sustainability.
examples.flagged_phrases: paradigm shift, beverage industry, approaches sustainability
examples.suggestion: We put water in cans instead of plastic bottles. It's not rocket science but somehow nobody else did it.

examples.marketing_copy: You could drink tap water. But tap water never headlined a music festival.
Sparkling water for people who think sparkling water is for fancy people. Plot twist: you're fancy now.
It's water. From the Alps. In a can. We're not going to overcomplicate this.
Our merch is dumb and we love it. Tallboy koozies, skull hats, the whole thing.
Hey, we get it. Drinking water is boring. But have you tried drinking water that looks like a beer?
Subscribe to Liquid Death and we'll mail you water every month. Like a magazine but heavier and wetter.
Liquid Death's robust platform delivers an industry-leading hydration experience powered by actionable insights from consumer research.
examples.flagged_phrases: robust platform, industry-leading, hydration experience, actionable insights
examples.suggestion: We sell water. People like it. That's all the research we need.

examples.marketing_copy: We are dedicated to facilitating a seamless integration of sustainable practices into every facet of our operations.
examples.flagged_phrases: facilitating, seamless integration, facet of our operations
examples.suggestion: We try not to trash the planet. Cans over plastic. Pretty simple.

examples.marketing_copy: Explore our thoughtfully curated collection of artisanal mountain water, crafted for the modern wellness enthusiast.
examples.flagged_phrases: thoughtfully curated collection, artisanal, crafted for, wellness enthusiast
examples.suggestion: Mountain water in a can. It's not artisanal. It's just good.

examples.marketing_copy: Each Liquid Death product is meticulously engineered to provide maximum refreshment while maintaining our unwavering commitment to quality.
examples.flagged_phrases: meticulously engineered, maximum refreshment, unwavering commitment to quality
examples.suggestion: We made the water taste good. That's basically our whole job.

examples.marketing_copy: Don't miss this exclusive opportunity! Order your limited-edition Liquid Death bundle now before it's gone forever!
examples.flagged_phrases: exclusive opportunity, limited-edition, now before it's gone forever
examples.suggestion: We made some limited bundles. They'll sell out eventually. No rush. Okay maybe a little rush.

examples.marketing_copy: The purest mountain spring water is carefully sourced and bottled to ensure optimal freshness is delivered to your doorstep.
examples.flagged_phrases: is carefully sourced, is delivered, optimal freshness
examples.suggestion: We grab water from the mountains, stick it in cans, and ship it to you. Fresh? Yeah, it's water.

examples.marketing_copy: Liquid Death invites all health-conscious individuals to embark on a transformative hydration journey that redefines personal wellness.
examples.flagged_phrases: health-conscious individuals, transformative hydration journey, redefines personal wellness
examples.suggestion: Drink water. Feel okay about it. That's the whole journey. You're done.

examples.marketing_copy: Our organization leverages strategic partnerships with environmental thought leaders to drive meaningful change in the beverage industry.
examples.flagged_phrases: leverages, strategic partnerships, thought leaders, meaningful change, beverage industry
examples.suggestion: We work with people who care about the environment. Together we do stuff that matters. The end.

examples.marketing_copy: Liquid Death's core competency lies in disrupting the traditional beverage paradigm through innovative, consumer-centric solutions.
examples.flagged_phrases: core competency, paradigm, innovative, consumer-centric solutions
examples.suggestion: We sell canned water. Nobody asked us to 'disrupt' anything. We just thought plastic bottles were dumb.

examples.marketing_copy: We didn't invent water. We just made it look cooler than your personality.
Sparkling or still? Doesn't matter. Both come in a can. Both judge your plastic bottle.
You could spend five bucks on a smoothie. Or you could grab a tallboy and still have money for bad decisions.
We're a water company that sponsors punk shows. Your move, Evian.
Liquid Death is proud to unveil our revolutionary new product line, designed to empower health-conscious consumers on their wellness journey.
examples.flagged_phrases: proud to unveil, revolutionary, product line, empower, health-conscious consumers, wellness journey
examples.suggestion: New stuff just dropped. It's water. You'll figure out the rest.

examples.marketing_copy: Our team of hydration experts has crafted a seamless integration of flavor and function to deliver an industry-leading refreshment experience.
examples.flagged_phrases: hydration experts, crafted, seamless integration, industry-leading, refreshment experience
examples.suggestion: We made flavored water. It tastes good. That's the whole story.

examples.marketing_copy: At Liquid Death, we leverage actionable insights from our valued customers to continuously optimize our robust platform for maximum impact.
examples.flagged_phrases: leverage, actionable insights, valued customers, optimize, robust platform
examples.suggestion: People tell us stuff. We listen. Then we make the water better.

examples.marketing_copy: Don't miss this game-changing opportunity to experience our world-class hydration solution at your earliest convenience!
examples.flagged_phrases: game-changing, experience, world-class, hydration solution, at your earliest convenience
examples.suggestion: We sell water. Grab some whenever. No rush.

examples.marketing_copy: A holistic approach is being taken by our organization to ensure that best practices are implemented across all core competencies.
examples.flagged_phrases: holistic approach, is being taken, best practices, are implemented, core competencies
examples.suggestion: We're trying to do things better. Across the board. That's it.

examples.marketing_copy: Consumers who prioritize sustainable beverage choices will find that our premium quality products exceed expectations and move the needle on environmental responsibility.
examples.flagged_phrases: consumers, sustainable beverage choices, premium quality, exceed expectations, move the needle
examples.suggestion: You like the planet? Cool, us too. Our cans get recycled. Bottles don't. Easy choice.
